reconciliation.interpretation: Qashier is total POS sales truth. Beam is a payment/channel bridge and must not be treated as total sales.

automationStatus.methodNow: aggregate JSON snapshot from authenticated Qashier report page with full visible product/category tables and hourly chart-derived POS trend
needsForLiveAutomation: official Qashier API or scheduled export ingest for repeated refresh
download/export automation if API is unavailable
customer-safe mapping layer for product family/size normalization
doNotUse: public dashboard scraping authenticated Qashier session

posHourly.caveat: Derived from Qashier visible hourly chart SVG markers; total exactly matches Qashier net sales.
